case_title: DANIEL T DEMETRIS VS. STEVE DAVIS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY DEMETRIS, DANIEL T DAVIS, STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEMETRIS, DANIEL T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, STEVE $1,340.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,390.00, COURT FINDS THAT THE REPAIR JOB WAS NOT PROPERLY COMPLETED; COURT AWARDS DAMAGES FOR LABOR ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, STEVE ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:N/A) SERVED OCT-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, STEVE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-25-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVIS, STEVE HEARING SET FOR FEB-04-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY STEVE DAVIS IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $150.00 OR MORE ON THE 15TH DAY OF EVERY MONTH COMMENCING FEBRUARY 15, 2010 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE FROM JUDGMENT CREDITOR REGARDING DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT BY INSTALLMENT, FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-25-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-25-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DEMETRIS, DANIEL T AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
